message:
feat(membrane): expand pointer validator with string-aware safety checks

Major expansion of ptr_validator.rs (+358/-162 lines net) to support the new
string ABI surface:

- Add string-specific validation modes: null-terminated buffer validation,
  bounded-length checks for strn* family, overlap detection for memcpy vs
  memmove disambiguation
- Implement progressive validation depth (configurable via runtime policy):
  quick (null + alignment only), standard (+ page boundary), thorough
  (+ full buffer scan)
- Add batch validation for multi-pointer operations (e.g., memcmp with
  both src and dst)
- Tighten alignment checking for SIMD-optimized paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
